rules.requirement: All required PREO fields must be present and machine-readable.
preo_hash must bind to the deterministic canonical PREO payload and proposal_hash must bind to the deterministic canonical proposal payload.
PREO artifacts must not mutate runtime, workflows, deploy configuration, registries, proof stores, authority stores, or merge state.
PREO legitimacy must reference preexisting authority lineage requirements and must not create or imply authority.
PREO must require nonce, object-hash, and authority-use replay controls before downstream execution can be legitimate.
PREO must require post-execution proof binding to validated object, authority, boundary, nonce, and result.
PREO must declare direct execution, direct deploy, direct registry mutation, alternate execution paths, and merge operations forbidden.
PREO must require governance changes to be governed by the same object, validation, lineage, replay, and proof disciplines.
